task_completion.description: Open the baseline script in GMAT or a text editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT application window showing 'dscovr_baseline' in the resources tree or script editor, or a text editor open with '~/Documents/missions/dscovr_baseline.script'.

task_completion.description: Configure the SKM_Burn to use SunEarthRot and set up the Vary command for the X-component.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing ImpulsiveBurn setup with Coordinate System set to SunEarthRot, or script editor showing 'SKM_Burn.CoordinateSystem = SunEarthRot' and 'Vary DC1(SKM_Burn.Element1...'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Achieve command for zero X-velocity at the X-Z plane crossing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI or script showing 'Achieve DC1(DSCOVR.SunEarthRot.VX = 0)' and a Propagate command stopping at 'DSCOVR.SunEarthRot.Y = 0'.

task_completion.description: Run the mission and successfully converge the Differential Corrector.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT message window displaying 'Targeter DC1 converged' or output text showing the converged values.
GMAT 'Save As' dialog, terminal command 'cp', or file manager showing 'dscovr_skm.script' in the '~/GMAT_output/' directory.

task_completion.description: Write the summary report containing the required Delta-V and time to crossing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '~/GMAT_output/l1_skm_report.txt'. It must contain a delta_v_x_m_s value (around 107.88 or 0.10788) and a time_to_crossing_days value (around 94.06).

integrity.description: Agent actually ran the mission in GMAT to find the values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing GMAT running, the message window with convergence logs, or GMAT output plots/reports, rather than just typing the final values into a text file directly.

integrity.description: The agent modified the script using GMAT or a text editor based on the task requirements, rather than downloading a pre-made solution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Step-by-step modification of the script or GUI elements in GMAT.

integrity.description: The report is saved in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal or file manager showing 'l1_skm_report.txt' specifically in '~/GMAT_output/'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The true required X-axis Delta-V is approximately 0.10788 km/s (107.88 m/s), and the time to the X-Z plane crossing is approximately 94.06 days. The agent may report the Delta-V as either 107.88 (correctly converted to m/s) or 0.10788 (unconverted km/s); both should be considered correct for the purpose of visual verification.
